subject: A robed figure in a dark forest, head thrown back as dark tendril-like forms emerge from or attack the head; holding a glowing gem
description: A figure in pale grey-blue robes stands in a dim forest. The figure's head is thrown back and dark organic matter — tentacle-like or smoke-like tendrils — erupts from or encircles the head and face. In the figure's cupped hands rests a small glowing purple-blue gem or orb. The forest behind is bare and wintry, with thin leafless trees. The light source is diffuse from above, giving the scene an eerie pale illumination. The overall register is sinister ritual or soul-theft.
foreground: Robed figure, head thrown back; dark tendrils around head; glowing gem in hands
background: Bare winter forest; diffuse pale light from above
emotion: ecstasy or agony — head thrown back, body rigid, unclear if the figure is victim or perpetrator
